name: RadioButtonComponent
description: Set of fields of FormItemControl component

inputs.name: ariaDescribedBy
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-describedby` attribute to the element.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-label` attribute to the element.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Sets the `aria-labelledby` attribute to the element.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description:
The field is used to tell if radio button should be disabled
Value: true or false
by default disabled state is set to false

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
The name of the radio button
The field is mandatory

inputs.name: readOnly
inputs.description: The field is used to tell if radio button should be read only

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is a mandatory field

inputs.name: standalone
inputs.description: Whether the control is a standalone.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description:
The field to set state of radio button using:
'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'default' | 'information'
by default value is set to 'default'

inputs.name: valignLabel
inputs.description: Vertical position of the label compared to the radio button

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Value field stores information about holding value by radio button
The field is mandatory

inputs.name: wrapLabel
inputs.description: Whether input label should be wrapped

methods.name: buildComponentCssClass
methods.description:
This method is responsible for building a css class based on current state
 It is implementation of CssClassBuilder interface and
 should be used with
